_comment: Java compilation units are class- and import-centric; interface declarations are less common than methods; weights follow typical single-file class plus import layout. Phase 14b-2: samples require `pip install tree-sitter-java` (not in the minimal omnix runtime deps). spring-framework / shallow elasticsearch in an early dry run produced almost no .java in grammar_profile; gson, guava, junit4, and kafka (apache) were used as the four n>=3 codebases with full Java ingests.
